entries.name: Agent Orchestrator
entries.description: Task-agent orchestration plugin - spawn and manage open-ended CLI task agents via PTY

entries.name: Agent Skills
entries.description: Agent Skills plugin for elizaOS - implement the Agent Skills specification with progressive disclosure

SKILLS_DIR.label: Dir
SKILLS_DIR.help: Directory to install and load skills from (default: ./skills)

SKILLS_AUTO_LOAD.label: Auto Load
SKILLS_AUTO_LOAD.help: Automatically load installed skills on startup

BUNDLED_SKILLS_DIRS.label: Skills Dirs
BUNDLED_SKILLS_DIRS.help: Comma-separated list of directories containing bundled (read-only) skills

OTTO_BUNDLED_SKILLS_DIR.label: Bundled Skills Dir
OTTO_BUNDLED_SKILLS_DIR.help: Legacy: Single directory containing Otto bundled skills

entries.name: Anthropic
entries.description: Anthropic model provider for Claude chat and reasoning models.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.label: Api Key
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.help: API key used to authenticate requests to Anthropic services

ANTHROPIC_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
ANTHROPIC_SMALL_MODEL.help: Override the default Anthropic small model identifier used by the plugin

ANTHROPIC_LARGE_MODEL.label: Large Model
ANTHROPIC_LARGE_MODEL.help: Override the default Anthropic large model identifier used by the plugin

ANTHROPIC_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.label: Experimental Telemetry
ANTHROPIC_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.help: Enable experimental telemetry features for enhanced debugging and usage analytics.

ANTHROPIC_BROWSER_BASE_URL.label: Browser Base Url
ANTHROPIC_BROWSER_BASE_URL.help: Browser-only proxy endpoint base URL for Anthropic requests (no secrets in the client).

entries.name: App Control
entries.description: Launch, close, and list running Eliza apps from agent chat. Backed by the /api/apps/* HTTP surface.

entries.name: Polymarket
entries.description: Native Polymarket market discovery and trading readiness for prediction markets.

entries.name: Auto Trader
entries.description: Autonomous trading plugin with LLM-powered strategies for Solana

entries.name: Background Runner
entries.description: Drives core TaskService.runDueTasks() from OS-level wake-ups (BGTaskScheduler on iOS, WorkManager on Android via @capacitor/background-runner). Falls back to a setInterval poll on non-mobile hosts. Registers serviceType="background_runner" and sets runtime.serverless=true.

entries.name: Blooio
entries.description: Integrates Blooio iMessage/SMS messaging into elizaOS with signed webhooks and outbound message sending.

entries.name: Bluebubbles
entries.description: BlueBubbles connector for sending and receiving iMessage through a local BlueBubbles server.

entries.name: Bluesky
entries.description: Bluesky connector for ElizaOS

BLUESKY_HANDLE.label: Handle
BLUESKY_HANDLE.help: The BlueSky handle (username) for the agent account.

BLUESKY_DRY_RUN.label: Dry Run
BLUESKY_DRY_RUN.help: Enables or disables dry run mode when interacting with BlueSky; when true, operations are simulated but not executed.

BLUESKY_ENABLED.label: Enabled
BLUESKY_ENABLED.help: Enables or disables the BlueSky plugin.

BLUESKY_PASSWORD.label: Password
BLUESKY_PASSWORD.help: The app password for authentication with BlueSky.

BLUESKY_ENABLE_DMS.label: Enable Dms
BLUESKY_ENABLE_DMS.help: Enable processing of direct messages via the chat.bsky API.

BLUESKY_POLL_INTERVAL.label: Poll Interval
BLUESKY_POLL_INTERVAL.help: Polling interval in seconds for BlueSky operations such as fetching new notifications.

BLUESKY_ENABLE_POSTING.label: Enable Posting
BLUESKY_ENABLE_POSTING.help: Enables or disables the ability to post to BlueSky.

BLUESKY_ACTION_INTERVAL.label: Action Interval
BLUESKY_ACTION_INTERVAL.help: Interval in seconds between action-processing cycles.

BLUESKY_MAX_POST_LENGTH.label: Max Post Length
BLUESKY_MAX_POST_LENGTH.help: Maximum number of characters allowed in a BlueSky post.

BLUESKY_POST_IMMEDIATELY.label: Post Immediately
BLUESKY_POST_IMMEDIATELY.help: If true, posts are published immediately instead of waiting for a schedule.

BLUESKY_POST_INTERVAL_MAX.label: Post Interval Max
BLUESKY_POST_INTERVAL_MAX.help: Maximum interval in seconds between automated posts.

BLUESKY_POST_INTERVAL_MIN.label: Post Interval Min
BLUESKY_POST_INTERVAL_MIN.help: Minimum interval in seconds between automated posts.

BLUESKY_MAX_ACTIONS_PROCESSING.label: Max Actions Processing
BLUESKY_MAX_ACTIONS_PROCESSING.help: Maximum number of BlueSky actions to process in a single batch.

BLUESKY_ENABLE_ACTION_PROCESSING.label: Enable Action Processing
BLUESKY_ENABLE_ACTION_PROCESSING.help: Turns on or off automated action processing for BlueSky events.

entries.name: Browser
entries.description: Web scraping and content extraction with Playwright

OPENAI_API_KEY.label: Api Key
OPENAI_API_KEY.help: OpenAI API key for AI-powered browser interactions

BROWSER_HEADLESS.label: Headless
BROWSER_HEADLESS.help: Run browser in headless mode (default: true)

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.label: Api Key
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.help: Anthropic API key for Claude-powered interactions

CAPSOLVER_API_KEY.label: Api Key
CAPSOLVER_API_KEY.help: CapSolver API key for automated CAPTCHA solving

BROWSERBASE_API_KEY.label: Api Key
BROWSERBASE_API_KEY.help: API key for Browserbase cloud browser service

entries.name: Cli
entries.description: CLI framework plugin for ElizaOS agents - provides command registration, execution, and utilities

entries.name: CLI Inference
entries.description: Node-only model provider that shells out to sanctioned local Claude or Codex CLIs.

ELIZA_CHAT_VIA_CLI.label: CLI Backend
ELIZA_CHAT_VIA_CLI.help: Enable CLI-backed large-tier inference with claude or codex.

ELIZA_CLI_TIMEOUT_MS.label: Timeout
ELIZA_CLI_TIMEOUT_MS.help: Per-call CLI spawn timeout in milliseconds.

entries.name: Clipboard
entries.description: File-based memory storage plugin for ElizaOS - persistent notes and clipboard

entries.name: Coding Tools
entries.description: Native coding tools (FILE, SHELL, WORKTREE) running directly in the agent. AST-validated commands, mtime-gated writes, sealed workspace roots, optional per-OS process sandboxing (sandbox-exec on macOS, bwrap on Linux).

CODING_TOOLS_WORKSPACE_ROOTS.label: Workspace roots
CODING_TOOLS_WORKSPACE_ROOTS.help: Comma-separated absolute paths the coding tools may read/write under. Defaults to the runtime's cwd.

CODING_TOOLS_DENY_COMMANDS.label: Forbidden command patterns
CODING_TOOLS_DENY_COMMANDS.help: Comma-separated regex patterns the SHELL action must refuse. Combined with the built-in denylist and AST analyzer.

CODING_TOOLS_SHELL_BG_BUDGET_MS.label: Foreground budget
CODING_TOOLS_SHELL_BG_BUDGET_MS.help: Shell invocations exceeding this auto-background and return a task_id.

CODING_TOOLS_OS_SANDBOX.label: OS-level sandbox
CODING_TOOLS_OS_SANDBOX.help: Wrap bash invocations in sandbox-exec (macOS) or bwrap (Linux) when available. AST analysis runs regardless.

entries.name: Commands
entries.description: Chat command system for Eliza agents (/help, /status, /reset, etc.)

entries.name: Computeruse
entries.description: Computer automation plugin for ElizaOS - enables AI agents to control the local machine (when supported) or a remote ComputerUse MCP server

COMPUTER_USE_ENABLED.label: Use Enabled
COMPUTER_USE_ENABLED.help: Enable computer use capabilities (desktop automation, screenshots, browser control)

COMPUTER_USE_SCREENSHOT_AFTER_ACTION.label: Use Screenshot After Action
COMPUTER_USE_SCREENSHOT_AFTER_ACTION.help: Automatically capture a screenshot after each desktop action

COMPUTER_USE_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS.label: Use Action Timeout Ms
COMPUTER_USE_ACTION_TIMEOUT_MS.help: Maximum action execution timeout in milliseconds

COMPUTER_USE_APPROVAL_MODE.label: Use Approval Mode
COMPUTER_USE_APPROVAL_MODE.help: Approval mode for computer-use commands: full_control auto-approves everything, smart_approve auto-approves safe read-only commands, approve_all requires approval for every command, off denies all commands.

COMPUTER_USE_BROWSER_HEADLESS.label: Use Browser Headless
COMPUTER_USE_BROWSER_HEADLESS.help: Run browser automation headlessly. Useful for CI and test environments without a visible desktop session.

entries.name: Contacts
entries.description: Android Contacts overlay app — wraps the @elizaos/capacitor-contacts native plugin.

entries.name: Copilot Proxy
entries.description: ElizaOS Copilot Proxy Model Provider - TypeScript implementation

entries.name: Database Viewer
entries.description: Inspect tables, media, vectors, and ad-hoc SQL.

entries.name: DeepSeek
entries.description: DeepSeek model provider.

DEEPSEEK_API_KEY.label: DeepSeek API Key
DEEPSEEK_API_KEY.help: API key for DeepSeek model requests.

entries.name: Directives
entries.description: Inline directive parsing for Eliza agents (@think, @model, @verbose, etc.)

ALLOW_EXEC.label: Exec
ALLOW_EXEC.help: Allow exec directive for shell configuration

DEFAULT_THINKING.label: Thinking
DEFAULT_THINKING.help: Default thinking level (off, minimal, low, medium, high)

entries.name: Discord
entries.description: Discord connector for elizaOS servers, voice, and message management with Eliza Cloud OAuth gateway or local bot-token setup.

DISCORD_API_TOKEN.label: Api Token
DISCORD_API_TOKEN.help: Discord API token used to authenticate and log in the Discord client/service.

DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID.label: Application Id
DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID.help: Discord application ID for the bot (auto-resolved from bot token if omitted)

CHANNEL_IDS.label: Ids
CHANNEL_IDS.help: Comma-separated list of Discord channel IDs that will be parsed into an array if provided.

DISCORD_TEST_CHANNEL_ID.label: Test Channel Id
DISCORD_TEST_CHANNEL_ID.help: Discord channel ID used during test suite to locate the test channel for sending messages, voice interactions, and other test operations.

DISCORD_VOICE_TRANSCRIPTS.label: Voice Transcripts
DISCORD_VOICE_TRANSCRIPTS.help: Set to "on" to record live diarized meeting transcripts whenever the bot sits in a voice channel. Off by default; the /transcribe slash command can start/stop per channel.

DISCORD_VOICE_CHANNEL_ID.label: Voice Channel Id
DISCORD_VOICE_CHANNEL_ID.help: ID of the Discord voice channel the bot should join when scanning a guild. If not supplied, the bot selects a channel based on member activity.

DISCORD_SHOULD_IGNORE_BOT_MESSAGES.label: Should Ignore Bot Messages
DISCORD_SHOULD_IGNORE_BOT_MESSAGES.help: If true, the bot will ignore messages from other bots. Can be overridden by character settings.

DISCORD_SHOULD_IGNORE_DIRECT_MESSAGES.label: Should Ignore Direct Messages
DISCORD_SHOULD_IGNORE_DIRECT_MESSAGES.help: If true, the bot will ignore direct messages. Can be overridden by character settings.

DISCORD_SHOULD_RESPOND_ONLY_TO_MENTIONS.label: Should Respond Only To Mentions
DISCORD_SHOULD_RESPOND_ONLY_TO_MENTIONS.help: If true, the bot will only respond when explicitly mentioned. Can be overridden by character settings.

DISCORD_LISTEN_CHANNEL_IDS.label: Listen Channel Ids
DISCORD_LISTEN_CHANNEL_IDS.help: Comma-separated list of Discord channel IDs where the bot will only listen (not respond).

owner.notes: The user's own Discord identity, driven via Discord Desktop's Chrome DevTools Protocol port. Eliza relaunches the local Discord client with --remote-debugging-port and reads/writes through the user's logged-in session — useful for DMs the agent's bot has no access to. macOS uses osascript/open -a; Windows uses taskkill/Discord.exe from %LOCALAPPDATA%\Discord\app-*. Linux is not supported yet.

agent.notes: The agent's own Discord bot identity. Paste a bot token from the Discord Developer Portal; posts, mentions, replies, slash commands, and voice all run through the bot user.

entries.name: Discord (Local)
entries.description: Discord (Local) connector for elizaOS.

entries.name: Knowledge
entries.description: Character Knowledge documents, fragments, and search routes for the agent.

entries.name: Edge Tts
entries.description: Free text-to-speech using Microsoft Edge TTS - no API key required

EDGE_TTS_VOICE.label: Tts Voice
EDGE_TTS_VOICE.help: Voice ID to use for synthesis (e.g., en-US-MichelleNeural, en-GB-SoniaNeural)

EDGE_TTS_LANG.label: Tts Lang
EDGE_TTS_LANG.help: Language code for synthesis (e.g., en-US, en-GB, de-DE)

EDGE_TTS_OUTPUT_FORMAT.label: Tts Output Format
EDGE_TTS_OUTPUT_FORMAT.help: Output format for audio (e.g., audio-24khz-48kbitrate-mono-mp3, audio-48khz-96kbitrate-mono-mp3)

entries.name: Elevenlabs
entries.description: ElevenLabs voice plugin for text-to-speech generation and conversational audio output.

ELEVENLABS_API_KEY.label: Api Key
ELEVENLABS_API_KEY.help: Primary ElevenLabs API key used for authenticating requests

ELEVENLABS_MODEL_ID.label: Model Id
ELEVENLABS_MODEL_ID.help: Model identifier to use for TTS generation

ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID.label: Voice Id
ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID.help: ID of the voice to synthesize with

ELEVENLABS_BROWSER_URL.label: Browser Url
ELEVENLABS_BROWSER_URL.help: Optional browser-safe proxy base URL that injects the API key server-side

ELEVENLABS_STT_DIARIZE.label: Stt Diarize
ELEVENLABS_STT_DIARIZE.help: Enable speaker diarization to identify different speakers

ELEVENLABS_VOICE_STYLE.label: Voice Style
ELEVENLABS_VOICE_STYLE.help: Style intensity (0-1) for the generated voice

ELEVENLABS_STT_MODEL_ID.label: Stt Model Id
ELEVENLABS_STT_MODEL_ID.help: Model identifier to use for speech-to-text transcription

ELEVENLABS_OUTPUT_FORMAT.label: Output Format
ELEVENLABS_OUTPUT_FORMAT.help: Audio output format returned by the API (e.g., mp3_44100_128 or pcm_16000)

ELEVENLABS_VOICE_STABILITY.label: Voice Stability
ELEVENLABS_VOICE_STABILITY.help: Voice stability factor (0-1) influencing consistency of speech

ELEVENLABS_STT_NUM_SPEAKERS.label: Stt Num Speakers
ELEVENLABS_STT_NUM_SPEAKERS.help: Expected number of speakers for diarization (1-32)

ELEVENLABS_STT_LANGUAGE_CODE.label: Stt Language Code
ELEVENLABS_STT_LANGUAGE_CODE.help: Language code for transcription (e.g., 'en', 'es'). Leave empty for automatic detection

ELEVENLABS_STT_TAG_AUDIO_EVENTS.label: Stt Tag Audio Events
ELEVENLABS_STT_TAG_AUDIO_EVENTS.help: Tag audio events like laughter, applause, etc.

ELEVENLABS_VOICE_SIMILARITY_BOOST.label: Voice Similarity Boost
ELEVENLABS_VOICE_SIMILARITY_BOOST.help: Similarity boost factor (0-1) affecting how closely the voice matches the target

ELEVENLABS_VOICE_USE_SPEAKER_BOOST.label: Voice Use Speaker Boost
ELEVENLABS_VOICE_USE_SPEAKER_BOOST.help: Flag to enable or disable speaker boost feature

ELEVENLABS_OPTIMIZE_STREAMING_LATENCY.label: Optimize Streaming Latency
ELEVENLABS_OPTIMIZE_STREAMING_LATENCY.help: Latency optimization level for streaming audio (0-4)

entries.name: Elizacloud
entries.description: elizaOS plugin to connect with elizaOS Cloud services

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_API_KEY.label: Cloud Api Key
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_API_KEY.help: API key used to authenticate requests to ElizaOS Cloud API (format: eliza_xxxxx). Get it from https://www.elizacloud.ai/dashboard/api-keys

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_BASE_URL.label: Cloud Base Url
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_BASE_URL.help: Base URL for all ElizaOS Cloud API requests.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_SMALL_MODEL.label: Cloud Small Model
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_SMALL_MODEL.help: Small/fast model for quick tasks (overrides SMALL_MODEL). Default: gemma-4-31b

SMALL_MODEL.label: Model
SMALL_MODEL.help: Fallback identifier for the small language model if ELIZAOS_CLOUD_SMALL_MODEL is not set.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_LARGE_MODEL.label: Cloud Large Model
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_LARGE_MODEL.help: Large/powerful model for complex tasks (overrides LARGE_MODEL). Default: gemma-4-31b

LARGE_MODEL.label: Model
LARGE_MODEL.help: Fallback identifier for the large language model if ELIZAOS_CLOUD_LARGE_MODEL is not set.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Cloud Embedding Model
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model to use for generating text embeddings.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_URL.label: Cloud Embedding Url
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_URL.help: Custom base URL for the ElizaOS Cloud embeddings endpoint.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_API_KEY.label: Cloud Embedding Api Key
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_API_KEY.help: Custom API key for the ElizaOS Cloud embeddings endpoint.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.label: Cloud Embedding Dimensions
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.help: Number of dimensions for the returned embedding vectors.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MODEL.label: Cloud Image Description Model
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model used for describing images.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MAX_TOKE.label: Cloud Image Description Max Tokens
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MAX_TOKE.help: Maximum number of tokens allowed in the image-description model response.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_TTS_MODEL.label: Cloud Tts Model
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_TTS_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model used for text-to-speech generation.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_TTS_VOICE.label: Cloud Tts Voice
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_TTS_VOICE.help: Voice profile to use for text-to-speech output.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_TTS_INSTRUCTIONS.label: Cloud Tts Instructions
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_TTS_INSTRUCTIONS.help: Optional instructions to control the style or behavior of the text-to-speech request.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.label: Cloud Experimental Telemetry
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.help: Enable experimental telemetry features for enhanced debugging and usage analytics.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_BROWSER_BASE_URL.label: Cloud Browser Base Url
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_BROWSER_BASE_URL.help: Browser-only proxy endpoint base URL for ElizaOS Cloud requests (no secrets in the client).

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_BROWSER_EMBEDDING_URL.label: Cloud Browser Embedding Url
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_BROWSER_EMBEDDING_URL.help: Browser-only proxy endpoint base URL for ElizaOS Cloud embeddings.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_ENABLED.label: Cloud Enabled
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_ENABLED.help: Enable ElizaCloud container provisioning, device auth, bridge, and backup services. When false, only inference model handlers are active.

ELIZAOS_CLOUD_APP_VERSION.label: Cloud App Version
ELIZAOS_CLOUD_APP_VERSION.help: Application version sent during device authentication.

entries.name: Embeddings
entries.description: Provider-agnostic (bring-your-own) TEXT_EMBEDDING provider. Point EMBEDDING_BASE_URL / EMBEDDING_API_KEY at any OpenAI-compatible /embeddings endpoint (a personal OpenAI key, Eliza Cloud, Voyage, Together, or a local TEI/Infinity/vLLM/LM Studio server) to get real memory/RAG embeddings independently of the chat brain. Registers ONLY the embedding slot — no text/image/audio handlers.

EMBEDDING_BASE_URL.label: Embedding Base Url
EMBEDDING_BASE_URL.help: Base URL of an OpenAI-compatible /embeddings endpoint (e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1, an Eliza Cloud URL, a Voyage proxy, or a local TEI/Infinity/vLLM server). Setting this (or the API key) activates the plugin.

EMBEDDING_API_KEY.label: Embedding Api Key
EMBEDDING_API_KEY.help: Bearer token for the embedding endpoint. Setting this (or the base URL) activates the plugin. Omit for local servers that need no auth.

EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Embedding Model
EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Embedding model identifier sent as the request `model` field.

EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.label: Embedding Dimensions
EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.help: Vector width. Must be one of 384, 512, 768, 1024, 1536, 2048, 3072. Keep this stable for the lifetime of a database — changing it invalidates stored vectors.

EMBEDDING_BROWSER_URL.label: Embedding Browser Url
EMBEDDING_BROWSER_URL.help: Browser-only server-side proxy URL for /embeddings. In a browser build the Authorization header is never sent unless this is set, so the API key stays server-side.

entries.name: Evm
entries.description: This plugin enables interaction with EVM-compatible chains, supporting token transfers, cross-chain bridging, and swaps via LiFi integration.

EVM_PRIVATE_KEY.label: Private Key
EVM_PRIVATE_KEY.help: Hex-encoded private key (starting with 0x) used by the WalletProvider to sign transactions.

EVM_RPC_PROVIDER.label: Rpc Provider
EVM_RPC_PROVIDER.help: Preferred RPC provider: 'alchemy', 'infura', 'ankr', or 'elizacloud'. If set, this provider is used first for all chains it supports, with fallback to others.

ALCHEMY_API_KEY.label: Api Key
ALCHEMY_API_KEY.help: Alchemy API key for RPC access. Supports Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Avalanche, BSC, and many more chains.

INFURA_API_KEY.label: Api Key
INFURA_API_KEY.help: Infura API key for RPC access. Supports Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Avalanche, Linea, and more.

ANKR_API_KEY.label: Api Key
ANKR_API_KEY.help: Ankr premium API key for RPC access. Supports the broadest range of EVM chains.

ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_ETHEREUM.label: Provider Ethereum
ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_ETHEREUM.help: Custom RPC URL for Ethereum mainnet (overrides provider-based RPC). For other chains, set ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_<CHAINNAME> (or EVM_PROVIDER_<CHAINNAME>) in your .env.

ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_BASE.label: Provider Base
ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_BASE.help: Custom RPC URL for Base mainnet (overrides provider-based RPC).

ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_ARBITRUM.label: Provider Arbitrum
ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_ARBITRUM.help: Custom RPC URL for Arbitrum One (overrides provider-based RPC).

ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_OPTIMISM.label: Provider Optimism
ETHEREUM_PROVIDER_OPTIMISM.help: Custom RPC URL for Optimism mainnet (overrides provider-based RPC).

TEE_MODE.label: Mode
TEE_MODE.help: Controls whether Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) mode is enabled.

WALLET_SECRET_SALT.label: Secret Salt
WALLET_SECRET_SALT.help: Salt value for TEE-derived wallet keypair.

SEPOLIA_RPC_URL.label: Rpc Url
SEPOLIA_RPC_URL.help: RPC endpoint URL for Sepolia testnet.

BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL.label: Sepolia Rpc Url
BASE_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL.help: RPC endpoint URL for Base Sepolia testnet.

entries.name: Experience
entries.description: Built-in advanced capability for recording and recalling transferable agent learnings, surfaced in the Character Experience workspace alongside trajectory inspection tooling.

AUTO_RECORD_THRESHOLD.label: Record Threshold
AUTO_RECORD_THRESHOLD.help: Minimum confidence required before the experience evaluator records a new learning.

entries.name: Facewear
entries.description: Unified facewear integration for Meta Quest, XReal, Apple Vision Pro, and Even Realities G1/G2 whole-headset pairing, display text, microphone audio, side-tap mic control, bridge Wi-Fi setup, and diagnostics.

FACEWEAR_SMARTGLASSES_TRANSPORT.label: Smartglasses Transport
FACEWEAR_SMARTGLASSES_TRANSPORT.help: Preferred Even Realities transport: auto, even-bridge, web-bluetooth, or noble.

options.label: Auto
options.description: Use an injected transport, native bridge, Web Bluetooth, then Noble in order.

options.label: Native Bridge
options.description: Use an iOS, Android, desktop, EvenHub, or Mentra bridge exposed by the host.

options.label: Web Bluetooth
options.description: Use browser BLE pairing for direct G1 access.

options.label: Noble BLE
options.description: Use Node/Bun BLE through the optional Noble transport.

FACEWEAR_SCAN_TIMEOUT_MS.label: Scan Timeout
FACEWEAR_SCAN_TIMEOUT_MS.help: BLE scan timeout in milliseconds for Noble-based direct G1 connections.

FACEWEAR_AUTO_INIT.label: Auto Init
FACEWEAR_AUTO_INIT.help: Send G1 connection-ready init packets after connecting.

FACEWEAR_INIT_MODE.label: Init Mode
FACEWEAR_INIT_MODE.help: Connection-ready init mode: lens-specific, official same-init, or Android F4 same-init.

options.label: Lens Specific
options.description: Send 0x4D 0x01 to the left lens and 0xF4 0x01 to the right lens.

options.label: iOS Same Init
options.description: Send 0x4D 0x01 to both lenses, matching EvenDemoApp iOS.

options.label: Android F4 Same Init
options.description: Send 0xF4 0x01 to both lenses, matching EvenDemoApp Android.

entries.name: Farcaster
entries.description: Farcaster connector for publishing casts and responding to social conversations.

ENABLE_CAST.label: Cast
ENABLE_CAST.help: Enables or disables the ability to post casts to Farcaster.

FARCASTER_FID.label: Fid
FARCASTER_FID.help: The Farcaster FID (user identifier) used to publish or manage casts for a specific account.

ACTION_INTERVAL.label: Interval
ACTION_INTERVAL.help: Interval in minutes between action-processing cycles.

MAX_CAST_LENGTH.label: Cast Length
MAX_CAST_LENGTH.help: Maximum number of characters allowed in a Farcaster cast.

CAST_IMMEDIATELY.label: Immediately
CAST_IMMEDIATELY.help: If true, posts are published immediately instead of waiting for a schedule.

CAST_INTERVAL_MAX.label: Interval Max
CAST_INTERVAL_MAX.help: Maximum interval in minutes between automated posts.

CAST_INTERVAL_MIN.label: Interval Min
CAST_INTERVAL_MIN.help: Minimum interval in minutes between automated posts.

FARCASTER_DRY_RUN.label: Dry Run
FARCASTER_DRY_RUN.help: Enables or disables dry run mode when interacting with Farcaster; when true, operations are simulated but not executed.

FARCASTER_HUB_URL.label: Hub Url
FARCASTER_HUB_URL.help: Base URL for the Farcaster hub the client should communicate with.

FARCASTER_SIGNER_UUID.label: Signer Uuid
FARCASTER_SIGNER_UUID.help: UUID of the Neynar signer associated with the Farcaster account, required to sign casts.

MAX_ACTIONS_PROCESSING.label: Actions Processing
MAX_ACTIONS_PROCESSING.help: Maximum number of Farcaster actions to process in a single batch.

FARCASTER_POLL_INTERVAL.label: Poll Interval
FARCASTER_POLL_INTERVAL.help: Polling interval in seconds for Farcaster operations such as fetching new casts.

ENABLE_ACTION_PROCESSING.label: Action Processing
ENABLE_ACTION_PROCESSING.help: Turns on or off automated action processing for Farcaster events.

entries.name: Google
entries.description: Google connector for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and Meet through one OAuth grant. Uses Eliza Cloud OAuth by default; falls back to local OAuth2 with developer credentials when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET are set on the agent.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.label: OAuth Client ID
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.help: Google OAuth2 client ID for local-OAuth fallback. Not needed when using Eliza Cloud OAuth.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.label: OAuth Client Secret
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.help: Google OAuth2 client secret for local-OAuth fallback. Not needed when using Eliza Cloud OAuth.

GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI.label: Redirect URI
GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI.help: OAuth2 redirect URI for local-OAuth fallback. A loopback URL is recommended for local auth.

owner.notes: The user's own Google account, connected via Eliza Cloud OAuth so the agent can read and act on the user's Gmail, Calendar, Drive, and Meet on the user's behalf.

agent.notes: A separate Google account that represents the agent's own identity. Same OAuth flow, different Google account at the OAuth screen.

entries.name: Local Inference
entries.description: Unified Eliza-1 local inference provider — text generation, embeddings, voice (TTS/ASR), and image description via the elizaOS llama.cpp fork. Replaces the deprecated plugin-local-ai / plugin-local-embedding pair.

MODELS_DIR.label: Models Dir
MODELS_DIR.help: Filesystem path to the directory where GGUF models are stored. Defaults to <stateDir>/models.

CACHE_DIR.label: Cache Dir
CACHE_DIR.help: Filesystem path to the cache directory for model assets (tokenizers, ONNX caches).

LOCAL_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
LOCAL_SMALL_MODEL.help: Filename of the small local model (TEXT_SMALL handler).

LOCAL_LARGE_MODEL.label: Large Model
LOCAL_LARGE_MODEL.help: Filename of the large local model (TEXT_LARGE handler).

LOCAL_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Embedding Model
LOCAL_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Filename of the embedding model used for vector embeddings.

LOCAL_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.label: Embedding Dimensions
LOCAL_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.help: Number of dimensions the embedding model outputs.

CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES.label: CUDA Visible Devices
CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES.help: Set to restrict which CUDA-enabled GPUs the runtime sees (e.g. `0,1`).

ELIZA_LOCAL_LLAMA.label: AOSP FFI Loader
ELIZA_LOCAL_LLAMA.help: Set to `1` on Android (elizaOS build) to enable the in-process bun:ffi loader (libllama.so + libeliza-llama-shim.so) via the @elizaos/plugin-aosp-local-inference companion plugin.

ELIZA_MODEL.label: Eliza-1 Tier
ELIZA_MODEL.help: Select a published Eliza-1 fine-tune tier. The runtime auto-picks the right quant flavor (gguf/polarquant/fp8/bf16) for your detected GPU and pulls it from HuggingFace on first use.

options.label: Eliza-1 2B (mobile / entry)
options.description: Smallest/entry tier; fits Android/iOS on-device inference and 16 GB consumer GPUs at Q4_K_M.

options.label: Eliza-1 4B (16-24 GB GPU)
options.description: Desktop-tier fine-tune for everyday workstation use.

options.label: Eliza-1 9B (24-48 GB GPU)
options.description: Workstation-tier fine-tune; Q4_K_M for 16 GB cards, PolarQuant for 24+.

options.label: Eliza-1 27B (cloud / 48 GB+)
options.description: Cloud-tier fine-tune; Q6_K GGUF on RTX 5090, fp8/bf16 on H200/B200.

entries.name: Local Storage

LOCAL_STORAGE_PATH.label: Storage Path
LOCAL_STORAGE_PATH.help: Filesystem root for attachment storage. Defaults to <stateDir>/attachments.

mcp.label: Mcp

PATH.label: Path

entries.name: Memory
entries.description: Agent memory

MEMORY_ENABLE_BM25.label: Enable Bm25
MEMORY_ENABLE_BM25.help: Enable keyword-based search with stemming for exact term matching.

MEMORY_TOKEN_BUDGET.label: Token Budget
MEMORY_TOKEN_BUDGET.help: Maximum tokens to use for memory context in prompts.

MEMORY_MIN_CONFIDENCE.label: Min Confidence
MEMORY_MIN_CONFIDENCE.help: Minimum confidence score (0-1) required to store extracted facts.

MEMORY_RETRIEVAL_LIMIT.label: Retrieval Limit
MEMORY_RETRIEVAL_LIMIT.help: Maximum number of memories to retrieve per query.

MEMORY_SUMMARY_ENABLED.label: Summary Enabled
MEMORY_SUMMARY_ENABLED.help: Enable hierarchical conversation summarization to reduce token usage.

MEMORY_SUMMARY_MAX_DEPTH.label: Summary Max Depth
MEMORY_SUMMARY_MAX_DEPTH.help: Maximum depth of the summary hierarchy (1=direct summaries, 2=summaries of summaries, etc).

MEMORY_SUMMARIES_PER_LEVEL.label: Summaries Per Level
MEMORY_SUMMARIES_PER_LEVEL.help: How many summaries to accumulate before creating the next level.

MEMORY_ENABLE_VECTOR_SEARCH.label: Enable Vector Search
MEMORY_ENABLE_VECTOR_SEARCH.help: Enable semantic similarity search using embeddings.

MEMORY_MESSAGES_PER_SUMMARY.label: Messages Per Summary
MEMORY_MESSAGES_PER_SUMMARY.help: How many messages to include in each Level 1 summary.

MEMORY_SUMMARY_TOKEN_BUDGET.label: Summary Token Budget
MEMORY_SUMMARY_TOKEN_BUDGET.help: Maximum tokens to use for conversation summaries in context.

MEMORY_CONSOLIDATION_THRESHOLD.label: Consolidation Threshold
MEMORY_CONSOLIDATION_THRESHOLD.help: Number of messages to buffer before triggering memory consolidation.

NEARAI_BASE_URL.help: Base URL for the NEAR AI Cloud OpenAI-compatible API.

NEARAI_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.help: Enable experimental telemetry features for enhanced debugging and usage analytics.

NEARAI_BROWSER_BASE_URL.help: Browser-only proxy endpoint base URL for NEAR AI requests. Do not expose API keys in browser clients.

NGROK_AUTH_TOKEN.label: Auth Token
NGROK_AUTH_TOKEN.help: Ngrok auth token. Required for stable tunnels and custom domains. Get one from https://dashboard.ngrok.com/get-started/your-authtoken

NGROK_REGION.label: Region
NGROK_REGION.help: Ngrok edge region (us, eu, ap, au, sa, jp, in).

NGROK_DOMAIN.label: Custom Domain
NGROK_DOMAIN.help: Reserved ngrok domain (paid feature). Leave blank for an auto-generated *.ngrok.io URL.

NGROK_SUBDOMAIN.label: Subdomain
NGROK_SUBDOMAIN.help: Reserved subdomain (paid feature, alternative to NGROK_DOMAIN).

NGROK_DEFAULT_PORT.label: Default Port
NGROK_DEFAULT_PORT.help: Local port to tunnel when none is given in the prompt.

OLLAMA_BASE_URL.help: Compatibility auto-enable key for a running Ollama server.

OLLAMA_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
OLLAMA_SMALL_MODEL.help: Name or tag of the small-sized Ollama model to use for text and object generation.

OLLAMA_MEDIUM_MODEL.label: Medium Model
OLLAMA_MEDIUM_MODEL.help: Name or tag of the medium-sized Ollama model (defined in config but not currently used).

LARGE_MODEL.label: Model

entries.description: Integrates OpenAI's GPT models for automated text generation with customizable prompts.

OPENAI_API_KEY.label: Api Key
OPENAI_API_KEY.help: API key used to authenticate requests to the OpenAI API.

CEREBRAS_API_KEY.label: Cerebras Api Key
CEREBRAS_API_KEY.help: Compatibility API key for Cerebras-hosted OpenAI-compatible requests.

OPENAI_BASE_URL.label: Base Url
OPENAI_BASE_URL.help: Base URL for all OpenAI API requests.

OPENAI_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
OPENAI_SMALL_MODEL.help: Identifier of the small language model to be used (overrides SMALL_MODEL).

SMALL_MODEL.label: Model
SMALL_MODEL.help: Fallback identifier for the small language model if OPENAI_SMALL_MODEL is not set.

OPENAI_LARGE_MODEL.label: Large Model
OPENAI_LARGE_MODEL.help: Identifier of the large language model to be used (overrides LARGE_MODEL).

LARGE_MODEL.label: Model
LARGE_MODEL.help: Fallback identifier for the large language model if OPENAI_LARGE_MODEL is not set.

OPENAI_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Embedding Model
OPENAI_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model to use for generating text embeddings.

OPENAI_EMBEDDING_URL.label: Embedding Url
OPENAI_EMBEDDING_URL.help: Custom base URL for the OpenAI embeddings endpoint.

OPENAI_EMBEDDING_API_KEY.label: Embedding Api Key
OPENAI_EMBEDDING_API_KEY.help: Custom API key for the OpenAI embeddings endpoint.

OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.label: Embedding Dimensions
OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.help: Number of dimensions for the returned embedding vectors.

OPENAI_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MODEL.label: Image Description Model
OPENAI_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model used for describing images.

OPENAI_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MAX_TOKENS.label: Image Description Max Tokens
OPENAI_IMAGE_DESCRIPTION_MAX_TOKENS.help: Maximum number of tokens allowed in the image-description model response.

OPENAI_TTS_MODEL.label: Tts Model
OPENAI_TTS_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model used for text-to-speech generation.

OPENAI_TTS_VOICE.label: Tts Voice
OPENAI_TTS_VOICE.help: Voice profile to use for text-to-speech output.

OPENAI_TTS_INSTRUCTIONS.label: Tts Instructions
OPENAI_TTS_INSTRUCTIONS.help: Optional instructions to control the style or behavior of the text-to-speech request.

OPENAI_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.label: Experimental Telemetry
OPENAI_EXPERIMENTAL_TELEMETRY.help: Enable experimental telemetry features for enhanced debugging and usage analytics.

OPENAI_BROWSER_BASE_URL.label: Browser Base Url
OPENAI_BROWSER_BASE_URL.help: Browser-only proxy endpoint base URL for OpenAI requests (no secrets in the client).

OPENAI_BROWSER_EMBEDDING_URL.label: Browser Embedding Url
OPENAI_BROWSER_EMBEDDING_URL.help: Browser-only proxy endpoint base URL for OpenAI embeddings.

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.help: API key used by the OpenRouter plugin for authenticating requests.

OPENROUTER_IMAGE_MODEL.label: Image Model
OPENROUTER_IMAGE_MODEL.help: Overrides the default image description model used by the OpenRouter plugin.

OPENROUTER_BASE_URL.label: Base Url
OPENROUTER_BASE_URL.help: Base URL for the OpenRouter API endpoints.

OPENROUTER_BROWSER_BASE_URL.label: Browser Base Url
OPENROUTER_BROWSER_BASE_URL.help: Browser-only proxy endpoint base URL for OpenRouter requests (no secrets in the client).

OPENROUTER_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
OPENROUTER_SMALL_MODEL.help: Overrides the default small language model used for text/object generation.

OPENROUTER_LARGE_MODEL.label: Large Model
OPENROUTER_LARGE_MODEL.help: Overrides the default large language model used for text/object generation.

SMALL_MODEL.label: Model
SMALL_MODEL.help: General fallback environment variable for the small model name when OPENROUTER_SMALL_MODEL is not set.

LARGE_MODEL.label: Model
LARGE_MODEL.help: General fallback environment variable for the large model name when OPENROUTER_LARGE_MODEL is not set.

IMAGE_MODEL.label: Model
IMAGE_MODEL.help: General fallback environment variable for the image model name when OPENROUTER_IMAGE_MODEL is not set.

OPENROUTER_IMAGE_GENERATION_MODEL.label: Image Generation Model
OPENROUTER_IMAGE_GENERATION_MODEL.help: Overrides the default image generation model used by the OpenRouter plugin.

IMAGE_GENERATION_MODEL.label: Generation Model
IMAGE_GENERATION_MODEL.help: General fallback environment variable for the image generation model name when OPENROUTER_IMAGE_GENERATION_MODEL is not set.

OPENROUTER_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Embedding Model
OPENROUTER_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Overrides the default text embedding model used by the OpenRouter plugin.

EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Model
EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: General fallback environment variable for the embedding model name when OPENROUTER_EMBEDDING_MODEL is not set.

OPENROUTER_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.label: Embedding Dimensions
OPENROUTER_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.help: Number of dimensions for embedding vectors. Supported values: 256, 384, 512, 768, 1024, 1536, 2048, 3072.

EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.label: Dimensions
EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.help: General fallback environment variable for the embedding dimensions when OPENROUTER_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS is not set.

OPENROUTER_AUTO_CLEANUP_IMAGES.label: Auto Cleanup Images
OPENROUTER_AUTO_CLEANUP_IMAGES.help: Whether to automatically cleanup generated images after a short delay.

OPENROUTER_TOOL_EXECUTION_MAX_STEPS.label: Tool Execution Max Steps
OPENROUTER_TOOL_EXECUTION_MAX_STEPS.help: Maximum number of steps for multi-step tool execution. Allows the AI to generate descriptive text after calling tools in AI SDK v5.

entries.name: Pdf
entries.description: Core Node.js plugin for elizaOS that provides essential services and actions for file operations.

entries.name: Phone
entries.description: Phone app for Eliza — Android dialer/call-log overlay (@elizaos/capacitor-phone) and the iOS Phone Companion (pairing, chat-mirror, remote-session).

entries.name: PII Guard
entries.description: Local NER PII pseudonymization for the model boundary — swaps named-entity PII (person / org / location) for realistic, reversible surrogates before the prompt reaches the provider, so the LLM never sees real names, employers, or places. Runs dslim/distilbert-NER (Apache-2.0) on-device via onnxruntime; enable the swap in core with ELIZA_PII_SWAP_ENABLED.

ELIZA_PII_SWAP_ENABLED.label: Enable PII Swap
ELIZA_PII_SWAP_ENABLED.help: Master switch (read by @elizaos/core). When on, named-entity PII is pseudonymized before every model call and restored at the execution boundary. Off by default — zero behavior change.

ELIZA_PII_NER_MODEL.label: NER Model
ELIZA_PII_NER_MODEL.help: HuggingFace token-classification model id for person/org/location detection. Downloaded on first use and cached under <stateDir>/local-inference/models.

ELIZA_PII_NER_SCORE_THRESHOLD.label: NER Score Threshold
ELIZA_PII_NER_SCORE_THRESHOLD.help: Minimum model confidence (0–1) for an entity to be swapped. Lower catches more PII (higher recall) at the cost of more false positives.

ELIZA_PII_SWAP_EXEMPT_VALUES.label: Never-Swap Values
ELIZA_PII_SWAP_EXEMPT_VALUES.help: Comma-separated exact values that must never be pseudonymized (false-positive opt-out), on top of the built-in framework/brand blocklist.

ELIZA_PII_SWAP_DISABLED_KINDS.label: Disabled Entity Kinds
ELIZA_PII_SWAP_DISABLED_KINDS.help: Comma-separated entity kinds to leave untouched, e.g. `location,address`.

RSS_FEED_FORMAT.help: Output format for feed items: 'csv' (compact) or 'markdown' (readable)

RSS_DISABLE_ACTIONS.label: Disable Actions
RSS_DISABLE_ACTIONS.help: Set to true to disable subscription management actions

RSS_CHECK_INTERVAL_MINUTES.label: Check Interval Minutes
RSS_CHECK_INTERVAL_MINUTES.help: Interval in minutes between feed checks

AWS_S3_BUCKET.label: S3 Bucket
AWS_S3_BUCKET.help: Name of the AWS S3 bucket used for file uploads and downloads.

AWS_S3_ENDPOINT.label: S3 Endpoint
AWS_S3_ENDPOINT.help: Custom S3-compatible endpoint (e.g., for non-AWS providers).

AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID.label: Access Key Id
AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID.help: AWS access key ID used for authenticating requests to AWS S3.

AWS_S3_SSL_ENABLED.label: S3 Ssl Enabled
AWS_S3_SSL_ENABLED.help: Flag indicating whether SSL should be enabled for the custom S3 endpoint.

AWS_S3_UPLOAD_PATH.label: S3 Upload Path
AWS_S3_UPLOAD_PATH.help: Default path or prefix inside the S3 bucket where files will be uploaded.

AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.label: Secret Access Key
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.help: AWS secret access key used for authenticating requests to AWS S3.

AWS_S3_FORCE_PATH_STYLE.label: S3 Force Path Style
AWS_S3_FORCE_PATH_STYLE.help: Flag to force path-style addressing when connecting to the S3 endpoint.

entries.name: Shell
entries.description: A shell plugin for ElizaOS. USE AT YOUR OWN RISK. THIS GIVES AI FULL ACCESS TO THE HOST MACHINE

SHELL_ALLOWED_DIRECTORY.label: Allowed Directory
SHELL_ALLOWED_DIRECTORY.help: The directory that shell commands are restricted to. Commands cannot execute outside this directory.

SHELL_TIMEOUT.label: Timeout
SHELL_TIMEOUT.help: Maximum command execution timeout in milliseconds

SHELL_FORBIDDEN_COMMANDS.label: Forbidden Commands
SHELL_FORBIDDEN_COMMANDS.help: Comma-separated list of additional forbidden commands

SHELL_MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS.label: Max Output Chars
SHELL_MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS.help: Maximum output characters to capture from commands

SHELL_BACKGROUND_MS.label: Background Ms
SHELL_BACKGROUND_MS.help: Default milliseconds to wait before backgrounding commands

SHELL_ALLOW_BACKGROUND.label: Allow Background
SHELL_ALLOW_BACKGROUND.help: Whether to allow background command execution

SHELL_JOB_TTL_MS.label: Job Ttl Ms
SHELL_JOB_TTL_MS.help: Time-to-live for finished session records in milliseconds

entries.name: Shopify
entries.description: Storefront and admin tools for agent-driven commerce.

entries.name: Signal
entries.description: Signal messaging integration plugin for ElizaOS agents

SIGNAL_CLI_PATH.label: Cli Path
SIGNAL_CLI_PATH.help: Path to signal-cli executable (alternative to HTTP API). Leave blank to resolve signal-cli from PATH and auto-install with Homebrew on macOS/Linux when available; on Windows or without Homebrew, install signal-cli manually and set this path.

SIGNAL_CLI_AUTO_INSTALL.label: Auto Install Cli
SIGNAL_CLI_AUTO_INSTALL.help: Set false to disable Homebrew auto-install for the default signal-cli binary on macOS/Linux.

SIGNAL_HTTP_URL.label: Http Url
SIGNAL_HTTP_URL.help: Signal CLI REST API URL (e.g., http://localhost:8080)

SIGNAL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER.label: Account Number
SIGNAL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER.help: Signal account phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890)

SIGNAL_SHOULD_IGNORE_GROUP_MESSAGES.label: Should Ignore Group Messages
SIGNAL_SHOULD_IGNORE_GROUP_MESSAGES.help: If true, the bot will only respond to direct messages

entries.name: Skills Viewer
entries.description: Create, enable, review, and install custom agent skills.

entries.name: Slack
entries.description: Slack connector for elizaOS agents with Eliza Cloud OAuth and local Socket Mode support.

SLACK_APP_TOKEN.label: App Token
SLACK_APP_TOKEN.help: Slack App Token (xapp-...) for Socket Mode connections

SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.label: Bot Token
SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.help: Slack Bot Token (xoxb-...) for API authentication

SLACK_USER_TOKEN.label: User Token
SLACK_USER_TOKEN.help: Optional User Token (xoxp-...) for enhanced permissions

SLACK_CHANNEL_IDS.label: Channel Ids
SLACK_CHANNEL_IDS.help: Comma-separated list of channel IDs to restrict the bot to

SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET.label: Signing Secret
SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET.help: Slack Signing Secret for verifying requests

SLACK_SHOULD_IGNORE_BOT_MESSAGES.label: Should Ignore Bot Messages
SLACK_SHOULD_IGNORE_BOT_MESSAGES.help: If true, the bot will ignore messages from other bots

SLACK_SHOULD_RESPOND_ONLY_TO_MENTIONS.label: Should Respond Only To Mentions
SLACK_SHOULD_RESPOND_ONLY_TO_MENTIONS.help: If true, the bot will only respond when mentioned

owner.notes: The user's own Slack identity (xoxp-... user token), connected via Eliza Cloud OAuth so the agent can read the user's channels, write messages as them, search their conversations, and read files they have access to.

agent.notes: The agent's own Slack bot identity (xoxb-... bot token), installed into the workspace via Eliza Cloud OAuth. Posts, mentions, replies, and DMs flow through the bot user.

entries.name: Social Alpha
entries.description: Social Alpha Plugin — Tracks token recommendations (shills/FUD), builds trust scores based on P&L outcomes, and exposes a Social Alpha Provider with win rate, rank, and recommender analytics.

entries.name: Tailscale
entries.description: Tunnel plugin — local Tailscale serve/funnel or Eliza Cloud-routed Tailscale auth-key minter. Mutually exclusive with the ngrok tunnel plugin.

TAILSCALE_BACKEND.label: Backend
TAILSCALE_BACKEND.help: Backend to use: 'local' (tailscale CLI), 'cloud' (Eliza Cloud-minted ephemeral auth key), or 'auto' (cloud when Eliza Cloud is connected, else local).

TAILSCALE_AUTH_KEY.label: Auth Key
TAILSCALE_AUTH_KEY.help: Optional pre-minted Tailscale auth key for the local backend. Most users authenticate once via 'tailscale up' and never set this.

TAILSCALE_TAGS.label: Tags
TAILSCALE_TAGS.help: Comma-separated ACL tags applied to the cloud-minted ephemeral key.

TAILSCALE_FUNNEL.label: Use Funnel
TAILSCALE_FUNNEL.help: When true, use 'tailscale funnel' to expose to the public Internet. When false, use 'tailscale serve' (tailnet-internal only).

TAILSCALE_DEFAULT_PORT.label: Default Port
TAILSCALE_DEFAULT_PORT.help: Used when no port is extracted from the user message.

TAILSCALE_AUTH_KEY_EXPIRY_SECONDS.label: Auth Key Expiry (seconds)
TAILSCALE_AUTH_KEY_EXPIRY_SECONDS.help: Expiry hint passed to the cloud auth-key minter.

entries.name: Tee
entries.description: A plugin for secure key derivation and remote attestation within Trusted Execution Environments (TEE).

TEE_MODE.label: Mode
TEE_MODE.help: Determines the Trusted Execution Environment operation mode (LOCAL, DOCKER, PRODUCTION) and is referenced in error handling to validate provided modes.

TEE_VENDOR.label: Vendor
TEE_VENDOR.help: Specifies which Trusted Execution Environment vendor to initialize (defaults to PHALA).

WALLET_SECRET_SALT.label: Secret Salt
WALLET_SECRET_SALT.help: Secret salt used to deterministically derive Solana and EVM keypairs inside the TEE.

entries.name: Telegram
entries.description: Telegram connector for bot chats, groups, channels, and topic-based conversations through BotFather tokens or an Eliza Cloud webhook gateway.

TELEGRAM_API_ROOT.label: Api Root
TELEGRAM_API_ROOT.help: Base URL for Telegram Bot API used by the TelegramService, allowing override of the default API endpoint.

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.label: Bot Token
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.help: Telegram bot token used for authenticating and operating the Telegram bot.

TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_CHATS.label: Allowed Chats
TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_CHATS.help: JSON-encoded array of Telegram chat IDs that are authorized to interact with the bot.

TELEGRAM_TEST_CHAT_ID.label: Test Chat Id
TELEGRAM_TEST_CHAT_ID.help: Telegram chat ID used by the test suite to send, receive, and validate messages during Telegram bot tests.

entries.name: Tlon
entries.description: Tlon connector for Urbit chat and social interactions.

entries.name: Todos
entries.description: User-scoped persistent todos with CRUD. Single TODO umbrella action with op-based dispatch (write/create/update/complete/cancel/delete/list/clear). The currentTodosProvider surfaces the user's pending + in-progress todos to the planner each turn. Backed by drizzle pgSchema('todos'); requires plugin-sql.

entries.name: Together AI
entries.description: Together AI model provider.

TOGETHER_API_KEY.label: Together API Key
TOGETHER_API_KEY.help: API key for Together AI model requests.

entries.name: Fine Tuning
entries.description: Collect training data, inspect trajectories, run Eliza harness evals, benchmark model tiers, and manage fine-tuned models.

entries.name: Trajectory Logger
entries.description: Trajectory logging plugin for ElizaOS - capture agent interaction trajectories for RL training

entries.name: Trajectory Viewer
entries.description: Inspect LLM call history, prompts, and execution traces.

entries.name: Trust
entries.description: Trust scoring, security signals, and permission helpers built into the elizaOS runtime (enable via enableTrust).

entries.name: Tts
entries.description: A plugin for generating text-to-speech using FAL.ai API within the ElizaOS ecosystem, featuring automatic language detection and voice selection.

TTS_AUTO_MODE.label: Auto Mode
TTS_AUTO_MODE.help: When to automatically apply TTS (off, always, inbound, tagged)

TTS_SUMMARIZE.label: Summarize
TTS_SUMMARIZE.help: Summarize long text instead of truncating

TTS_MAX_LENGTH.label: Max Length
TTS_MAX_LENGTH.help: Maximum text length for TTS synthesis

TTS_DEFAULT_PROVIDER.label: Default Provider
TTS_DEFAULT_PROVIDER.help: Default TTS provider (auto, elevenlabs, openai, edge)

entries.name: Tunnel
entries.description: Local Tailscale-CLI tunnel backend (serve / funnel). Implements the canonical tunnel-service contract; coexists with plugin-tailscale, plugin-ngrok, and the Eliza Cloud headscale backend via first-active-wins.

TUNNEL_DEFAULT_PORT.label: Default Port
TUNNEL_DEFAULT_PORT.help: Used when no port is extracted from the user message.

TUNNEL_USE_FUNNEL.label: Use Funnel
TUNNEL_USE_FUNNEL.help: When true, use 'tailscale funnel' to expose to the public Internet. When false, use 'tailscale serve' (tailnet-internal only).

entries.name: Twilio
entries.description: A Twilio plugin for ElizaOS that enables SMS and voice call capabilities.

entries.name: Twitch
entries.description: Twitch connector for live chat, channel events, and audience interactions.

entries.name: Vercel Ai Gateway
entries.description: Vercel AI Gateway provider for routing model requests through a single endpoint.

AIGATEWAY_API_KEY.label: Api Key
AIGATEWAY_API_KEY.help: Alternate env var for AI Gateway API key.

VERCEL_OIDC_TOKEN.label: Oidc Token
VERCEL_OIDC_TOKEN.help: OIDC token for Vercel (used as Bearer auth for Gateway).

AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY.label: Gateway Api Key
AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY.help: API key for Vercel AI Gateway (OpenAI-compatible endpoints).

AI_GATEWAY_BASE_URL.label: Gateway Base Url
AI_GATEWAY_BASE_URL.help: Base URL for AI Gateway OpenAI-compatible API.

AI_GATEWAY_IMAGE_MODEL.label: Gateway Image Model
AI_GATEWAY_IMAGE_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model used for image generation.

AI_GATEWAY_LARGE_MODEL.label: Gateway Large Model
AI_GATEWAY_LARGE_MODEL.help: Identifier of the large language model to be used.

AI_GATEWAY_SMALL_MODEL.label: Gateway Small Model
AI_GATEWAY_SMALL_MODEL.help: Identifier of the small language model to be used.

AI_GATEWAY_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Gateway Embedding Model
AI_GATEWAY_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Identifier of the model to use for generating text embeddings.

AI_GATEWAY_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.label: Gateway Embedding Dimensions
AI_GATEWAY_EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS.help: Number of dimensions for the returned embedding vectors.

entries.name: Video
entries.description: Video download, audio extraction, and transcription helpers (YouTube, Vimeo, direct MP4).

entries.name: Vision
entries.description: Vision plugin for ElizaOS - provides camera integration and visual awareness

CAMERA_NAME.label: Name
CAMERA_NAME.help: Camera name to search for (lowercase partial match)

PIXEL_CHANGE_THRESHOLD.label: Change Threshold
PIXEL_CHANGE_THRESHOLD.help: Percentage of pixels that must change to trigger VLM update (default: 50)

entries.name: Webhooks
entries.description: HTTP webhook ingress for external triggers (wake, agent, mapped hooks)

entries.name: Whatsapp
entries.description: A plugin for integrating WhatsApp Cloud API with applications, enabling messaging capabilities and webhook handling.

WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN.label: Access Token
WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN.help: Access token for WhatsApp Cloud API (required for cloudapi auth)

WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID.label: Phone Number Id
WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID.help: Phone number ID for WhatsApp Cloud API (required for cloudapi auth)

WHATSAPP_AUTH_DIR.label: Auth Dir
WHATSAPP_AUTH_DIR.help: Directory used to persist Baileys session files (required for baileys auth)

WHATSAPP_PRINT_QR.label: Print Qr
WHATSAPP_PRINT_QR.help: Print QR code in terminal when using Baileys auth

entries.name: Wifi
entries.description: Wi-Fi overlay app for the Eliza Android build — scan, inspect, and connect to nearby networks via @elizaos/capacitor-wifi.

entries.name: Workflow
entries.description: Natural-language workflow actions (create, activate, deactivate, delete). Workflows run in-process with the agent runtime using workflows.

entries.name: X (Twitter)
entries.description: X (formerly Twitter) connector for posts, mentions, replies, DMs, and timeline interactions through the elizaOS plugin-x runtime.

TWITTER_AUTH_MODE.label: Auth Mode
TWITTER_AUTH_MODE.help: How the connector authenticates with X. Use 'broker' to log in via Eliza Cloud OAuth, 'oauth' to do OAuth2 PKCE locally, or 'env' to provide developer API keys directly.

TWITTER_CLIENT_ID.label: OAuth Client ID
TWITTER_CLIENT_ID.help: X/Twitter OAuth2 client ID for TWITTER_AUTH_MODE=oauth.

TWITTER_REDIRECT_URI.label: Redirect URI
TWITTER_REDIRECT_URI.help: OAuth2 redirect URI for TWITTER_AUTH_MODE=oauth. A loopback URL is recommended for local auth.

TWITTER_SCOPES.label: OAuth Scopes
TWITTER_SCOPES.help: Space-separated OAuth2 scopes requested by plugin-twitter.

TWITTER_API_SECRET_KEY.label: API Secret
TWITTER_API_SECRET_KEY.help: X/Twitter API secret key for TWITTER_AUTH_MODE=env.

TWITTER_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET.label: Access Token Secret
TWITTER_ACCESS_TOKEN_SECRET.help: OAuth 1.0a access token secret for TWITTER_AUTH_MODE=env.

TWITTER_BROKER_URL.label: Broker URL
TWITTER_BROKER_URL.help: Eliza Cloud X (Twitter) broker base URL. Override only to point at a self-hosted broker; otherwise leave the default.

TWITTER_BROKER_TOKEN.label: Broker Token (optional)
TWITTER_BROKER_TOKEN.help: Cloud auth token used to identify this agent to the broker. Defaults to ELIZAOS_CLOUD_API_KEY when unset, so most users can leave this blank.

TWITTER_ENABLE_POST.label: Enable Posting
TWITTER_ENABLE_POST.help: Allow the connector to publish posts.

TWITTER_ENABLE_REPLIES.label: Enable Replies
TWITTER_ENABLE_REPLIES.help: Allow the connector to reply to mentions and conversations.

TWITTER_ENABLE_ACTIONS.label: Enable Likes/Reposts
TWITTER_ENABLE_ACTIONS.help: Allow engagement actions such as likes, reposts, and quote posts.

TWITTER_TARGET_USERS.label: Target Users
TWITTER_TARGET_USERS.help: Comma-separated usernames to interact with. Leave empty to use the plugin defaults.

TWITTER_DRY_RUN.label: Dry Run
TWITTER_DRY_RUN.help: Log intended X/Twitter actions without publishing them.

owner.notes: The user's own X account, connected via Eliza Cloud OAuth so the agent can post / reply / DM on the user's behalf.

agent.notes: A separate X account that represents the agent's own identity. Same OAuth flow, different X account at the OAuth screen.

entries.name: xAI (Grok)
entries.description: xAI Grok models for text generation and embeddings.

XAI_API_KEY.label: API Key
XAI_API_KEY.help: xAI API key for Grok model access.

XAI_MODEL.label: Model
XAI_MODEL.help: xAI Grok model for large/default text generation (e.g. grok-3).

XAI_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
XAI_SMALL_MODEL.help: xAI Grok model for faster/smaller tasks.

entries.name: z.ai
entries.description: z.ai model provider for text generation.

ZAI_API_KEY.label: z.ai API Key
ZAI_API_KEY.help: Primary API key for z.ai model requests.

Z_AI_API_KEY.label: Legacy z.ai API Key
Z_AI_API_KEY.help: Legacy API key alias accepted when ZAI_API_KEY is absent.

ZAI_BASE_URL.label: z.ai Base URL
ZAI_BASE_URL.help: Base URL for z.ai OpenAI-compatible API requests.

entries.name: Zalo
entries.description: Zalo connector for official account messaging and support workflows.

entries.name: Zalouser
entries.description: Zalo personal-account connector for one-to-one messaging workflows.
